title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Bharat Petroleum

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Bharat Petroleum
jsonLd.description:
Bharat Petroleum is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bharat Petroleum:
Bharat Petroleum is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bharat Petroleum!
